automated_checks.result: Only manifest v2 files are retained after generation.
Verified 20 local input hashes before normalization.
2,946 raw price rows preserved across six batches: 500/500/500/500/500/446.
4,051 non-empty facility price values parsed exactly; two no-price rows remain group headers.
Every 2025 price record has is_current=false and current-price lookup disabled.
Historical secondary policy is disabled; official 01/07/2026 tiers are limited to household contributions.
For 13–19/07/2026, 3 active documents were accepted and 0 documents require review.
Active discovery reads schedule source folders and excludes generated output.
Canonical schedules/YYYY/YYYY-MM-DD_to_YYYY-MM-DD sources take precedence over legacy paths for the same week and type; 0 duplicate sources were excluded.
A same-start partial document is accepted only when every source cell after its source end date is Nghỉ or blank; no out-of-range assignment is silently dropped.
The accepted week has 245 entries: 172 named, 10 generic and 60 closed.
Schedule entries are not slots; zero capacity or booking-state records were generated from roster data.
Default 20 is isolated as an overridable, unapproved, non-production prototype config.
All source-fact and structured-record references in FAQ, conversation and evaluation fixtures resolve.
No legacy synthetic identifier, label or reference field remains in generated JSON.
All 22 manifest file hashes and byte counts match.

human_review_gates.requirement: Match the 2025 local price file to the hospital publication and approve historical-only display wording.
Provide and approve the current hospital price appendix before enabling current-price answers.
Hospital data owner confirms the official BHXH household-contribution extract and its narrow scope.
Review schedule source ownership, week range and approval status before runtime exposure.
Review generic assignments, multi-room duplicates and cross-facility notes before production.
The hospital must approve a capacity model; the project default of 20 is never production eligible.
Review all 100 expected evaluation outcomes, especially emergency, stale-price and BHYT boundaries.

limitations: The price dataset is a historical 2025 snapshot and cannot answer current-price questions.
The schedule dataset is a weekly working roster, not an appointment inventory or booking confirmation system.
The official BHXH extract covers household contribution amounts only, not personal medical benefit entitlement.
Automated structure validation does not replace hospital, clinical, legal, privacy or security approval.
